credential_failure_marker: load mandatory root-owned client credential before startup

properties.After: systemd-journald.socket sysinit.target network.target basic.target systemd-remount-fs.service -.mount shadowpipe-lockdown-restore.service system.slice
properties.ExecStart: { path=/usr/local/bin/shadowpipe-client ; argv[]=/usr/local/bin/shadowpipe-client $SHADOWPIPE_CLIENT_ARGS ; ignore_errors=no ; start_time=[Fri 2026-07-17 03:20:39 MSK] ; stop_time=[Fri 2026-07-17 03:20:39 MSK] ; pid=1070 ; code=exited ; status=1 }
